creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #14)

The failure still does involve:

Fatal kernel mode data abort: 'Alignment Fault' on read


For reference:

# uname -apKU
FreeBSD OPiP2E-RPi2v1p1 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT main-n277207-62f55b34ec42 GENERIC arm armv7 1500042 1500042

The most recent snapshot's *.pkg involved
are of the form:

FreeBSD-*-15.snap20250512102706
